posts.text: 6. Lively's team attempted to throw out the MJOP as untimely, filed far too late. But Judge Liman refused and instead signaled that the Court would consider the MJOP and MSJ concurrently, at the same time.

Freedman attempting to "lock" her into a deficient complaint.

posts.text: The mods of the r/BlakeLivelyFans subreddit asked members of their community to post messages of support for Blake Lively as she continues her sexual harassment case. What you’re seeing here is a small collage of those messages, of people taking a moment to remind someone under an enormous amount of scrutiny that she isn’t alone. posts.text: In attempting to cover up their own misconduct, Justin Baldoni and Wayfarer have targeted the women who have spoken up about their negative experiences with him. Going so far as to allegedly file false claims in a court of law. Baldoni may not have harassed and abused all of them, but he has stood by watching and encouraging the attacks on their careers in order to save his own. #blakelively #justinbaldoni #itendswithus #popculture #feminism
